packs.name: AR Collections Assistant
packs.description: Automates accounts-receivable collections workflows: overdue invoice detection, reminder drafting, escalation routing, and payment reconciliation. Integrates with ERP systems via MCP tools. Requires AR_ERP_URL and AR_ERP_TOKEN environment variables.

overdue_days_threshold.description: Days past due before sending first reminder

escalation_days_threshold.description: Days past due before escalating to collections team

packs.name: Incident Triage
packs.description: On-call incident triage assistant: classifies severity, correlates related alerts, drafts runbooks, and pages the right team. Connects to PagerDuty, Opsgenie, or webhooks. Reduces mean-time-to-acknowledge by surfacing context from past incidents.

auto_page_threshold.description: Minimum severity level for automatic paging

context_window_hours.description: Hours of past incidents to include as context

packs.name: PR Review Assistant
packs.description: Automated pull-request review: checks for style violations, security anti-patterns, missing tests, and documentation gaps. Posts inline comments via the GitHub or GitLab API. Configurable checklist per repository.

review_scope.description: Whether to review the full file or only changed lines

require_tests.description: Flag PRs that reduce test coverage

max_files_per_review.description: Skip review if PR touches more files than this

packs.name: HR Onboarding
packs.description: Guided employee onboarding assistant: answers policy questions, schedules orientation meetings, tracks completion of required readings, and generates personalised 30/60/90-day plans. Integrates with HRIS and calendar systems.

onboarding_duration_days.description: Length of the structured onboarding period

send_welcome_email.description: Automatically send welcome email on first login

checklist_template.description: Which onboarding checklist template to use

packs.name: Legal Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over a legal document corpus: contracts, policies, court opinions, and regulatory filings. Answers questions with source citations and confidence scores. Index your documents via the CLI before enabling.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

citation_style.description: How citations appear in the response

packs.name: Finance Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over financial documents: annual reports, earnings calls, 10-K/10-Q filings, analyst notes, and internal finance policies. Ideal for FP&A teams doing research across large document sets.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

fiscal_year_filter.description: Restrict results to the current fiscal year by default

packs.name: DevOps On-Call
packs.description: Real-time alert triage and runbook automation for on-call engineers. Classifies incoming alerts (P1/P2/P3), maps them to suspected components, looks up matching runbook steps, and attaches an observability snapshot (metrics + log excerpts) before paging the engineer. Distinct from incident-triage, which handles post-incident RCA. Supports PagerDuty, Opsgenie, and Alertmanager inbound sources.

auto_p1_statuspage.description: Automatically open a Statuspage incident for P1 alerts (requires STATUSPAGE_API_KEY)

snapshot_lookback_minutes.description: Minutes of observability history to include in the snapshot

runbook_match_threshold.description: Minimum runbook match score before falling back to the generic triage runbook

similar_incident_days.description: Days of history to search for similar past incidents

packs.name: HR Policy RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over HR documents: employee handbook, benefits guides, PTO policy, code of conduct, and org charts. Employees ask natural-language questions; the assistant cites the exact policy paragraph.

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

strict_policy_only.description: Decline to answer questions not grounded in retrieved policy text

packs.name: Sales Qualification (BANT + MEDDIC)
packs.description: Multi-agent lead qualification using BANT (Budget/Authority/Need/Timeline) and MEDDIC (Metrics/Economic Buyer/Decision Criteria/Decision Process/Identify Pain/Champion) frameworks. Ingests leads from HubSpot webhooks, Salesforce platform events, or email threads. Outputs structured qualification scores, evidence quotes, MEDDIC completeness checklists, and next-action recommendations. All CRM write-backs are HOTL-gated.

bant_pass_threshold.description: Minimum BANT score (0–100) to advance a lead to MEDDIC deep-dive

meddic_complete_threshold.description: Minimum MEDDIC completeness % to mark a lead as Sales-Qualified

deal_stage_on_sqo.description: CRM deal stage name applied when a lead becomes a Sales-Qualified Opportunity

enrichment_enabled.description: Run web-search enrichment for leads with insufficient BANT data

weekly_digest_cron.description: Cron expression for the weekly pipeline digest (default: Monday 08:00 UTC)

packs.name: VMware Ops
packs.description: VMware infrastructure ops agent-team. Consumes the vmware-skill family over MCP (9 read-only diagnostic servers + vmware-pilot for execution) — reimplements nothing. Ships a conversation-only expert team (vSphere, monitoring, vSAN storage, VKS, NSX, NSX-security, Aria, AVI, hardening) plus an incident-triage agent that drafts an RCA and a change-plan from vCenter/Aria alarms. Every change routes through an Agent Bridge to a vmware-pilot workflow with a HOTL approval gate, audit, and rollback — the team never mutates infrastructure autonomously. Replaces the removed agent-platform C22.

advice_only.description: Disable the remediation bridge entirely (pure read-only advice/RCA, no pilot execution path)

auto_triage_severity.description: Minimum vCenter alarm severity that auto-triggers the ops-triage RCA agent

context_window_hours.description: Hours of vCenter events / Aria metrics to gather as RCA context
